title: Verilator tool generating sc_inout<uint32_t> instead of an sc_inout<sc_lv<32>>
body:
Hello,

For one of our project we are using Verilator tool to convert verilog code file to corresponding SystemC code file.
We noticed Verilator generated as **sc_inout<uint32_t>** for inout ports of corresponding wire signal type of verilog code.

As wire type in verilog is to resolve multi driver conflict for bidirectional port we hope to get similar data type while converting through Verilator to systemC.

Could you please help,  Is there any way Verilator can generate Verilog wire type signals declaration to SystemC sc_inout ports with 4-state types (either **sc_lv<n>** or **sc_logic**) rather than of 2-state type { **sc_inout<uint32_t>** }  ?

Verilator version : Verilator 3.922 2018-03-17 rev verilator_3_920-32-gdf3d1a4
VCS version : vcs_2019.06

Regards,
Gaurav Minda
